title: CWSM Amulet Plus
description: A CWSM addon that adds a highly customizable overlay to display the amulet's tooltip
body:
A simple addon for **Cracker's Wither Storm Mod** that makes it so you can track the distance of each bound entity much easier.

This mod needs to be installed both on the server and client to function.

### Features

*   **Curios Slot:** You can now store your amulet inside of a curios belt slot.
*   **Overlay:** While equipped, an overlay will appear displaying the name, direction and distance of each bound entity on the amulet.

### Config

The mod has an extensive config:

*   Customizable overlay layout.
*   Change the text color and direction symbols.
*   Toggle which bound colors you want to see.
*   Serverside config to toggle certain features for ALL players.

### Requirements

This mod requires the following mods to work properly:

*   [**Cracker's Wither Storm Mod**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crackers-wither-storm-mod)
*   [**Curios API**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/curios)
